---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Axiom
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ovenpickled
---

## Summary

A one-line description of the feature.

## Problem it Solves

What problem does this feature address? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Be as specific as you can - keybindings, behaviour, config options, etc.

## Prior Art

How do other editors handle this? (Vim, Neovim, Nano, Micro, Helix, etc.) Links or examples are helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Anything else - screenshots, references, related issues, etc.

---

> **Note:** Features that require external dependencies will not be accepted.
> Axiom is deliberately dependency-free. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
